title: Soft Sweet Indian Pita Jalebi
description: A sweet and nutty Indian dessert featuring pita bread, toasted to perfection and shaped like a jalebi, this vegetarian-friendly treat is perfect for any occasion. It is a one-pot dish that combines the softness of pita with the crunch of toasted bread.
instructions: In a large bowl, combine the flour, sugar, and yeast, and mix well to combine.
Gradually add the ghee or oil, and mix until a smooth dough forms.
Knead the dough for 5 minutes until it becomes soft and elastic.
Cover the dough with a damp cloth and let it rest for 30 minutes.
Preheat the oil in a deep frying pan to 350 degrees Fahrenheit.
Cut the pita bread slices into long strips and toast them until they are lightly browned.
Soak the toasted pita strips in the dough mixture for a few seconds on each side.
Fry the pita strips in the hot oil until they are golden brown and crispy.
Drain the fried pita strips on paper towels and sprinkle with cardamom powder and chopped pistachios.
Serve the Soft Sweet Indian Pita Jalebi warm, drizzled with rose water.
